ddls:
CREATE TABLE "municipalities" (
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each municipality */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the municipality */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the municipality is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the municipality is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the municipality */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the municipality */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the municipality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_types" (
  "fund_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund type */,
  "fund_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fund type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the fund type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the municipality */,
  "fund_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund type */,
  "exp_operating" REAL /* Operating expenses */,
  "exp_transfer_out" REAL /* Transfer out payments */,
  "depreciation" REAL /* Depreciation */,
  "capital_cost" REAL /* Capital costs */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue */,
  "expense" REAL /* Total expense */,
  "surplus_deficit" REAL /* Surplus or deficit */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_fund_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_type_id") REFERENCES fund_types ("fund_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing record */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the municipality */,
  "housingunits" REAL /* Number of housing units */,
  "mhi" INTEGER /* Median household income (MHI) */,
  "s5metric" REAL /* S5 metric (composite measure of financial and housing stability) */,
  "vacancy_rate" REAL /* Vacancy rate of housing units */,
  "median_home_price" INTEGER /* Median home price */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the housing data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., financial, housing) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the data (e.g., web interface, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial record */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_history_financial_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("financial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the housing record */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_history_housing_id FOREIGN KEY ("housing_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("housing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of the import */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the imported data */,
  "imported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who imported the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the import process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_imported_by FOREIGN KEY ("imported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date of the export */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the exported data */,
  "exported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the export process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_exported_by FOREIGN KEY ("exported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "destination_name" TEXT /* Name of the destination */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the destination */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the destination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., financial, housing) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
